# Vadim Vladymtsev

> Creator, Co-Founder and CTO of Century AI Studio. CTO / R&D Director at StackLevel Group. Enterprise AI product builder, public AI expert, speaker and technical auditor.

This file is a curated, AI-readable index for https://vadimohka.com. It points language models and AI search systems to the most important public pages and facts about Vadim Vladymtsev.

## Canonical pages

- [Home](https://vadimohka.com/): executive profile and primary positioning.
- [Century AI Studio](https://vadimohka.com/century.html): enterprise AI Studio and operating layer for enterprise AI.
- [Selected proof](https://vadimohka.com/proof.html): product creation, R&D leadership, teaching, ICPC, Stepik, research and public expertise.
- [Expert & Speaking](https://vadimohka.com/expert.html): expert commentary, speaking, technical audit and media formats.
- [Enterprise AI](https://vadimohka.com/enterprise.html): AI implementation for banks, fintech and regulated organisations.
- [Investor diligence](https://vadimohka.com/investors.html): technical lens on AI companies, architecture, data position and execution risk.
- [Founder support](https://vadimohka.com/founders.html): product architecture, technical focus and delivery rhythm.
- [Contact](https://vadimohka.com/contact.html): ways to work with Vadim.

## Key facts

- Vadim Vladymtsev is the Creator, Co-Founder and CTO of Century AI Studio.
- Vadim is CTO / R&D Director at StackLevel Group.
- Century AI Studio is an enterprise AI operating layer for assistants, workflows, documents, data access, SQL, MCP/API, auditability, metrics and deployment control.
- Vadim works with enterprise AI contexts such as banks, fintech, investment companies and international corporations.
- Vadim's background includes university teaching, ICPC coaching, education products, R&D, product architecture and enterprise AI implementation.
- Teaching scale: 700+ university students and 4,700+ online learners.
- Competitive programming: coached 200+ teams; BSUIR #1: So Stuffy reached finals in Luxor and Astana.
